data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commits 33e450240015 and 3b8647fbc396 are on main, (2) skills/knots.md and skills/knots_e2e.md both contain worktree guidance instructing agents to use kno -C <path_to_repo>, (3) changes are minimal and scoped correctly — 3 lines added to each file, (4) no invariants defined, (5) pre-existing flaky test in self_manage unrelated to this change. No regressions from these changes.
